site.title: Kayden Mayhew - Web Designer and Front-End Developer
site.description: Im a enthusiastic Web Designer from Saskatchewan, wanting to make pretty and dynamic sites for the internet. I enjoy taking the old and making it something new. I am skilled in Figma, Illustrator, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP.

footer.author: AI under the guidance of DanG-IT Professional

intro.name: Kayden Mayhew
intro.summary: A web designer trying to make a prettier internet

about.title: About me
about.intro: Hi, I'm Kayden a web deisgner and developer from Saskatchewan
about.toolsIntro: My primary tools of choice includes:
about.passion: Beyond website development, I like video games, movies, reading, and being active outside, usually bring my beagle, Odin with me. My biggest fixation is NANANANANA BATMAN! I think he is really cool and collect all sorts of merchandise of him.
about.approach: I try to get things done my way, but if that doesn't work I reach out to other methods. In the end I want a end product I and my client are proud of.
